items.name: Darren the STAR cap
items.description:
How to obtain this artifact
1. Join our roblox group where we release tons of FREE limiteds often:
https://www.roblox.com/groups/32849160/Antid-te#!/about

2. Follow the following users:
https://www.roblox.com/users/2944427202/profile
https://www.roblox.com/users/495147639/profile
https://www.roblox.com/users/225429011/profile

3. Join the game and wait for the timer to end! (Without going AFK)
https://www.roblox.com/games/14755320506/FREE-UGC-Follow-Up

After all these steps you will end up with an exclusive "Darren the STAR cap" in you're inventory.

We release free items off group member count and one simple click can help us release way more so please join:
https://www.roblox.com/groups/32849160/Antid-te#!/about
